{
  "mnemonics": [
    "Detect Deadlock: DARE (Determine, Analyze, Resolve, Exit)",
    "Prevent Deadlock: PASTA (Avoid, Seek, Acquire, Release, Timeout, Abort)"
  ],
  "keyPoints": [
    "A deadlock occurs when two or more processes are blocked indefinitely, each waiting for the other to release a resource.",
    "To detect a deadlock, analyze the resource allocation graph and check for cycles. If a cycle is found, a deadlock is present.",
